expectations.text: Identifies picker.go or main.go as oversized / god module
expectations.evidence: Shortlist includes picker.go (1520 LOC) and main.go (1581 LOC)

expectations.text: Calls out http.go fan-in or central hub role
expectations.evidence: Identified pkg/stream/http.go fan-in 21 as legitimate but load-bearing API

expectations.text: Provides a refactor shortlist (4 or fewer headline items)
Identifies or flags the false-positive errors.go cycle (basename-collision artefact)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly flagged: 'the reported cycle ... are both artefacts of the basename-match resolver tying together two unrelated errors.go files'
Response discusses the basename-matcher false positive directly
